migrations/ · functions/

connect · load · hand off" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="150" x="260" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sess" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0f766e;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4" value="ONE POSTGRESQL SESSION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="490" x="460" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="views" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="session state (pg_temp)
pgmi_source_view
pgmi_parameter_view
pgmi_plan_view" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="480" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b45309;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="deploy.sql takes control
ordering · transactions · tests" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="770" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="your database" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="775" y="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="proj" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="cli"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="views" value="loads files + parameters"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="views" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b45309;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#b45309;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="dep" value="hands control"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="dep" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="db" value="executes your plan"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=12;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="pgmi prepares the session. Your SQL decides the deployment." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="490" x="460" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
